zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas ap Llywelyn於大約1385年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根潔辛爾文時，他的父親Llewelyn ap Hywel56歲，母親Maud verch Ieuan58歲。他與Gwenllian ferch Dafydd在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas ap Llywelyn于大约1385年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根潔辛爾文时，他的父亲Llewelyn ap Hywel56岁，母亲Maud verch Ieuan58岁。他与Gwenllian ferch Dafydd在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas ap Llywelyn was born about 1385, in Resolven, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llewelyn ap Hywel, was 56 and his mother, Maud verch Ieuan, was 58. He married Gwenllian ferch Dafydd in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 1452.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas ap Llywelyn est né environ 1385, à Resolven, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llewelyn ap Hywel, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Maud verch Ieuan, avait 58 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian ferch Dafydd à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1452.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas ap Llywelyn um 1385 in Resolven, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewelyn ap Hywel 56 und seine Mutter Maud verch Ieuan 58. Er hat in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Gwenllian ferch Dafydd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1452.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas ap Llywelyn è nato il circa 1385 nel Resolven, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llewelyn ap Hywel, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Maud verch Ieuan, aveva 58 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian ferch Dafydd nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1452.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelynが約1385年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンレソルベンで生まれた時，父Llewelyn ap Hywelは56歳，母Maud verch Ieuanは58歳であった。イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでGwenllian ferch Dafyddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Llywelyn(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 레솔븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewelyn ap Hywel(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud verch Ieuan(은)는 58세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Gwenllian ferch Dafydd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas ap Llywelyn nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Resolven, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llewelyn ap Hywel, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Maud verch Ieuan, tinha 58 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian ferch Dafydd em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1452.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas ap Llywelyn родился около 1385 г. в местности ресолвен, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llewelyn ap Hywel было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud verch Ieuan, 58. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian ferch Dafydd в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1452 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas ap Llywelyn nació aproximadamente 1385, en Resolven, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llewelyn ap Hywel, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Maud verch Ieuan, tenía 58 años. Se casó con Gwenllian ferch Dafydd en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1452.
